nasb.text: Satan answered the Lord and said, “Skin for skin! Yes, all that a man has he will give for his life.

esv.text: Then Satan answered the Lord and said, “Skin for skin! All that a man has he will give for his life.

cnv.text: 撒但回答耶和華說：“人以皮換皮，寧可付出他所有的一切去保命。

ccb.text: 撒旦回答说：“人会以皮换皮，为了保全生命，情愿舍弃一切。
